Page Reader

Page Reader is a component that allow to fetch any Tangora page content by ID and display it in any place on page that invokes the component. Fetch is done using bits of code used by Tangora Lightbox, but unlike Lightbox it does display content inline.

Page Reader component also allows to be used with Tangora's built-in listpaction.aspx component, useful for fetching data from linked lists when building page details.

Examples (3)
Example Code
<as-page-reader page-id="270" scripts></as-page-reader>
<as-page-reader pagetemplatebypass page-id="271" scripts></as-page-reader>
<as-page-reader pagetemplatebypass page-id="267" params="action=search&searchmethod=0&search=test" scripts></as-page-reader>
Properties (7)
Property name Description Type
component-type Optional: component type defining where Page Reader will fetch data from. Allowed keywords are: displaypage, listaction. Defaults to displaypage string
page-id Required: ID of the page we want content to be fetched from. number
record-id Required: [for listaction] record ID of the page to fetch data from. number
layoutpage-id Required: [for listaction] layoutpage ID. number
pagetemplatebypass Optional: when present none of the CSS styles or scripts that are used by page layout are imported. string
scripts Optional: when present it allow component code to process scripts definitions passed from fetched page. string
params Optional: when present it allow component code to add parameters to fetched page. Useful for e.g. passing some filtering parameters to a list page. Params attribute is e.g. used with Search menu component to fetch results from search page based on user input. string
Events (1)
Event name Description Example value
as-page-reader:loaded Fired when Page reader successfully fetches and displays data. {component: 'listaction', pageid: 162, recordid: 23, layoutpageid: '-10000002'}<br/><br/>{component: 'displaypage', pageid: 271}
